title: Investigations
description: Investigations are structured research workspaces that organize your clinical questions, cohort queries, and analytical findings. Each investigation tracks your hypothesis, data sources, and outputs in one place.
tips: Create a new investigation for each distinct research question or study protocol.
Investigations support multiple cohort definitions and analyses — link them together for a complete picture.
Use the notes section to document your hypothesis, inclusion criteria, and preliminary findings.
Completed investigations can be exported for sharing with collaborators or publication workflows.
